pages.title: Admin Commands
pages.text: Animus provides a set of $(animus)/animus$() admin commands for server operators (permission level 2+). These are useful for testing rituals, debugging LP issues, and managing demon will.$(br2)All commands are executed as $(item)/animus <subcommand>$()

pages.title: LP Commands
pages.text: $(bold)/animus getlp$()$(br)Displays your current Life Essence (LP) stored in your Soul Network.$(br2)$(bold)/animus setlp <amount>$()$(br)Sets your Soul Network LP to the specified amount. Useful for testing rituals and sigils without needing to sacrifice.$(br2)Example: $(item)/animus setlp 1000000$()

pages.title: Demon Will Commands
pages.text: $(bold)/animus fillwill <type>$()$(br)Fills the current chunk with demon will of the specified type (up to 100).$(br2)Valid types: $(will)default$(), $(will)corrosive$(), $(will)destructive$(), $(will)vengeful$(), $(will)steadfast$()$(br2)Example: $(item)/animus fillwill destructive$()

pages.title: Gem Commands
pages.text: $(bold)/animus gemtype <type>$()$(br)Changes the demon will type of the tartaric gem you are holding. The gem's current will amount is preserved.$(br2)$(bold)/animus fillgem$()$(br)Fills the tartaric gem you are holding to its maximum capacity.$(br2)Both commands require you to hold a tartaric gem in your main hand.
